positive: A stylized, minimalist portrait of a wise, majestic owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl should have powerful, striking silhouettes, with feathers defined by deep indigo and ethereal gold highlights. The background is a deep, cosmic midnight blue gradient, accented by subtle nebula swirls and constellations rendered in iridescent silver ink. Composition must be centered, highly symmetrical, and suitable for screen printing on a dark fabric. The mood is mystical, sophisticated, and comforting. Style should be a blend of modern tattoo art and ethereal graphic design. Focus on crisp lines, high contrast, and vector-like clarity. Use dramatic rim lighting to emphasize the owl's form against the starry void.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, bad anatomy, amateur, out of focus, grain, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, messy
